internal_services.service_name: Payment of Legal Claims of Job Order and Casual Employees (Check Payment)
internal_services.who_may_avail: Job order and casual employees of the city government

steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive the processed voucher and check for completeness; 1.2 Prepare the check; 1.3 Review and forward the check to the Administrative Division for ESRE encoding and signature of the City Treasurer
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Officer III, City Treasurer (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)
Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Officer III (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

internal_services.service_name: Payment of Legal Claims of Job Order and Casual Employees (Cash Payment)
internal_services.who_may_avail: Job order and casual employees of the city government

steps.agency_action: 1. Receive the processed payroll and check for completeness
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Officer III (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)
Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Officer III (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)
